name: anime-aggressors
description: Shōnen-inspired platform fighter with rollback-first simulation and optional Edge-IO wearables

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:web
scripts.build:pages: npm run godot:export:web && npm run validate:godot-cache && npm run validate:godot-fighters && npm run validate:godot-rig && npm run validate:godot-animation && npm run validate:godot-vfx && npm run validate:godot-product && npm run build:web && npm run assert:godot-export && npm run verify:godot-public && npm run finalize:pages
scripts.preview:pages: npm run build:pages && npm run preview -w anime-aggressors-web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @anime-aggressors/game-core && npm run build -w @anime-aggressors/rollback && npm run typecheck -w @anime-aggressors/game-core -w @anime-aggressors/rollback -w @anime-aggressors/netplay -w @anime-aggressors/edgeio -w @anime-aggressors/messages -w @gunnch/input -w anime-aggressors-web
scripts.test:workspaces: npm run build -w @anime-aggressors/game-core && npm run test:game-core && npm run test:rollback && npm run test:netplay && npm run test:edgeio && npm run test:web
scripts.verify: npm run mobile:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.quality: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run validate:godot-product && npm run build
scripts.release:check: npm run quality && npm run build:pages
